---
title: "Argo Bias"
subtitle: "Statistical Analysis of Argo Float Sampling"
author: "Daniel Ross"
date: today
---

## Overview

This site collects analysis reports for a study of ocean heat content sampling bias
in Argo float observations.

The sampling bias arises because Argo floats are not uniformly distributed in space or
time. We use GLORYS12 reanalysis fields and PARCELS Lagrangian particle simulations to
characterize and quantify the bias.

Use the sidebar to navigate between reports and jump to individual sections.
